column110:
Where We’re Most Active
We’re particularly competitive on schemes that fall outside challenger bank appetite, often where this would otherwise result in lower leverage or more drawn-out credit processes. This is typically the case for non-vanilla schemes and first-time developers, even where there is strong underlying technical or contracting experience. However, this is an area of the market we’re comfortable supporting, provided the right structures and professionals are in place.

More broadly, our key USP is certainty, alongside flexibility on structure and the ability to deliver higher gearing with attractive pricing. That certainty is achieved by front-loading our due diligence so we can stand behind the terms we issue. As a smaller non-bank lender, our credit committee is lean and made up of individuals who would already be familiar with the scheme details, meaning it is more of a tick-box exercise rather than a forum where appetite, leverage, or pricing materially changes.

This naturally makes us relationship-driven, with a large proportion of our lending coming from referrals and repeat borrowers. We’re also keen to get to site early to meet the borrower and fully understand the scheme, which often leads to better outcomes from the outset.

Typical make-up of borrowers/schemes:
-	Contractors or property professionals delivering first developments
-	Higher gearing / mezz-led structures
-	Listed buildings
-	Single high-value units
-	JVs with landowners
-	Projects generally requiring a more bespoke approach

column110: We lend on OMV180 (VP) in all cases. Except Commercial Property where WAULT is 6+ we can lend on investment valuation. Generally we go up to 90% Net max, but we allow deferred consideration to allow for 100% Net. Title Splits and Lease Extensions are core products we have pioneered, we can lend on the uplifted value (e.g. split value, lease extended value) ahead of legal creation (valuer supported). Works are funded based on 10% of OMV value (or split value etc) day 1 release. For commercial transactions above EUR 10m we can consider European assets.
column113: We offer pre-agreed extensions where delays are looking likely. They usually cost 1% of Gross Loan. Non agreed extension would result in change to default interest on a serviced basis while they hopefully try to redeem us. Repossession process is something we prefer to avoid.

column84: Light is 50% of day one, no structural, no change of use. Medium is up to 60% of day one value, can have structural works, can have planning, change of use and increase footprint by up to 25% - this does not include going up eg loft conversions. Heavy is up to 75% of day one value, 30% increase in footprint, can have change of use, full planning etc Beyond 75% has no real parameters but is priced for risk.

column110:
There is very little in the unregulated space we can't work with you on, funding is my opinion the best in the market, totally discretionary and totally unique. We sign off everything under £15m on desk, with no credit committees. Process is totally transparent with initial enquiries being dealt with by Dexter and I and post-app going to a Credit Manager who you have direct access to via phone and email.

We are one of the only lenders in the market who will consider acquisition (without and planning) + refurb as one loan - for example underwriting the refurb with assumed planning and a backup exit without, removing the need for a holding bridge and not delaying the client starting works.
